job.title: Registered Nurse – ICU
job.company: King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre
job.description: King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre (KFSH&RC) is recruiting ICU Registered Nurses to join our world-class critical care team in Riyadh. Tax-free salary plus accommodation, flights, and healthcare.

job.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
job.description: Microsoft MEA is hiring a Cloud Solutions Architect to lead enterprise Azure migrations and cloud-native design for major clients across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar.

job.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
job.description: Ooredoo Group is hiring a Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor, detect, and respond to threats across its regional telecoms infrastructure and enterprise IT environment.

job.title: Commissioning Engineer – Oil & Gas
job.description: Wood Group is seeking a Commissioning Engineer to lead pre-commissioning and commissioning activities for upstream and midstream oil & gas facilities in Abu Dhabi.

job.title: Electrical Engineer – Power Distribution
job.description: Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) is hiring Electrical Engineers to design and oversee medium and high voltage power distribution networks across the Kingdom.

job.title: Quantity Surveyor
job.description: Parsons Corporation is recruiting a Quantity Surveyor to support major infrastructure projects in Riyadh under the Vision 2030 programme. You will prepare cost estimates, manage subcontractor payments, and ensure value engineering.

job.title: Senior MEP Design Engineer
job.description: We are seeking an experienced Senior MEP Design Engineer to lead design activities for luxury residential and commercial towers in Dubai. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing schematics, detail designs, and coordinating multi-disciplinary projects.

job.title: IT Officer
job.description: We are looking for a skilled IT Officer to support and maintain our organisation's IT infrastructure, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations and timely technical support to users in Lusail.

job.title: Enterprise Network Engineer (Cisco ACI)
job.description: We are seeking a senior Enterprise Network Engineer specializing in Cisco Application Centric Infrastructure (ACI) to manage and optimize our cloud data center networking layouts.

job.title: Remote IT Support Engineer
job.description: WB Hire Digital is seeking a Remote IT Support Engineer to deliver professional level remote desktop, server, and directory assistance to our corporate clients during UAE hours.

job.title: CNC Machine Operator
job.description: BEMCO is hiring CNC Machine Operators for our heavy manufacturing facility in Abu Dhabi. The successful candidates will configure and run CNC machines to fabricate metal parts according to engineering specs.

job.title: Industrial Electrician
job.description: We are seeking active Industrial Electricians to lay cabling, install switches, and troubleshoot electrical systems on our large commercial construction sites in Dubai.

job.title: Registered Staff Nurse
job.description: Kuwait National Hospital is seeking qualified Staff Nurses to provide high-quality care across our general wards. We offer attractive benefits and support for MOH licensing.

job.title: Pastry & Bakery Cook (Commi 1)
job.description: A high-end catering and confectionery house in Riyadh is hiring a pastry and bakery cook to prepare luxury desserts, artisanal breads, and pastries for VIP events.

job.title: Specialty Coffee Barista
job.description: Join our vibrant cafe team in Jeddah. We are hiring a passionate Specialty Coffee Barista to prepare artisanal brews and maintain a warm, welcoming customer atmosphere.

job.title: B2B Sales Executive (PPE)
job.description: Rumi Safety is a leading provider of safety workwear and PPE products. We are seeking a B2B Sales Executive to promote our catalogs to major contracting and oilfield sites in Qatar.

job.title: Full Stack Developer (Node.js & React)
job.description: GulfTech Innovations is building the next-generation fintech solutions for the Saudi market. We are looking for a Full Stack Developer proficient in React.js and Node.js to join our growing engineering team in Riyadh.

job.title: Restaurant General Manager
job.description: Join a prestigious fine-dining establishment in the Pearl, Doha. We are looking for an energetic, service-oriented Restaurant General Manager to run daily operations, manage budgets, and deliver exceptional guest experiences.

job.title: B2B Sales Executive (IT Solutions)
job.description: Matrix Telecom is a leading enterprise connectivity provider in Bahrain. We are seeking a results-driven B2B Sales Executive to acquire new corporate clients and upsell Cloud and Cyber Security solutions.

job.title: Staff Nurse (Pediatric Ward)
job.description: MedCare Specialist Hospital is an accredited healthcare facility in Muscat. We are seeking caring, dedicated Staff Nurses to join our pediatric department and provide excellent clinical care to children and infants.

job.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
job.description: We are an innovative media agency representing luxury retail brands in the GCC. We are hiring a remote-first Digital Marketing Specialist to design, implement, and track growth campaigns on social and search platforms.

job.title: Cyber Security Analyst
job.description: ShieldNet protects critical financial institutions in the GCC. We are seeking a seasoned Cyber Security Analyst to join our Security Operations Center (SOC) in Dubai, focusing on proactive threat hunting and incident response.

job.title: IT Support Engineer
job.description: Join a dynamic team at AA Talent Hub and take your IT career to the next level! We are seeking an IT Support Engineer in Qatar with strong troubleshooting, networking, and end-user support skills.

job.title: IT Support Engineer (Onsite)
job.description: BCIC Swiss GmbH (Best Connect International Company) is seeking a skilled and bilingual IT Support Engineer to join our onsite team in Tokyo, Japan. In this role, you will bridge the gap between technical operations and user support, ensuring seamless IT functionality for our corporate environment.

job.title: Head of Venue Technology Delivery
job.description: INTALEQ is seeking a Head of Venue Technology Delivery to lead the delivery of venue technology projects across stadiums, venues, and major events, ensuring successful execution from planning and design through deployment and operational handover.

job.title: Project Low Current Engineer
job.description: A leading Operation & Maintenance Company in Saudi Arabia is hiring a Project Low Current Engineer in Dammam to design and oversee low-current systems including ICT, CCTV, access control, fire alarms, sound and PA, and BMS systems.

job.title: Senior Site Engineer – Life Safety & Communication
job.description: MagnaTechs is looking for a talented Senior Site Engineer to lead the delivery of life safety and communication systems across projects in Amman, Jordan. The role requires hands-on expertise in PA/VA, fire alarm, CCTV, and access control systems.

job.title: Senior BMS / ELV Engineer
job.description: A leading Qatar-based firm is seeking a highly experienced Senior BMS/ELV Engineer to design, commission, and oversee Building Management Systems and Extra Low Voltage systems including CCTV, access control, fire alarm, PA, and structured cabling on major construction projects.

job.title: Recruiter Intern
job.description: CandidZone is looking for a motivated Recruiter Intern to join our HR team in Qatar. This is a great opportunity for recent graduates to gain hands-on experience in recruitment, candidate sourcing, and HR coordination.

job.title: Security Systems & ELV – Multiple Roles
job.description: Propel Consult is hiring for a global cybersecurity and compliance firm for multiple roles in Security Systems and ELV (Extra Low Voltage) Solutions across Riyadh and Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. Open positions include Project Manager, Assistant Manager, Admin Officer, HSE Officer, and Warehouse In-Charge.

job.title: Civil Site Engineer
job.description: Al Habtoor Engineering is seeking a Civil Site Engineer to oversee construction activities for high-rise residential and commercial developments across Dubai. You will be responsible for daily site supervision, quality control, and coordination with the project management team.

job.title: Electrical Engineer – Power Systems
job.description: Saudi Electricity Solutions is hiring an Electrical Engineer specialising in power systems for large-scale infrastructure projects across Riyadh. The successful candidate will design, install, and commission HV/LV systems and transformers.

job.title: QA/QC Inspector – Structural Steel
job.description: Gulf Inspection Services is looking for a QA/QC Inspector specialising in structural steel fabrication and erection for ongoing marine and industrial projects in Bahrain.

job.title: HSE Manager
job.description: Oman Construction Group requires an experienced HSE Manager to lead all health, safety, and environmental activities across multiple building construction projects in Muscat. You will implement and maintain an ISO 45001-compliant HSE Management System.

job.title: HSE Officer – Construction
job.description: RedLine Contracting is seeking an HSE Officer to implement safety procedures and ensure a safe working environment across construction sites in Kuwait City. The role involves daily site inspections, permit-to-work management, and safety training coordination.

job.title: Senior Quantity Surveyor
job.description: Turner & Townsend is hiring a Senior Quantity Surveyor to join our project management consultancy team in Dubai, working on prestigious hospitality, commercial, and mixed-use developments.

job.title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect
job.description: Fujitsu Middle East is looking for a Cloud Infrastructure Architect to design, build, and manage enterprise cloud environments for large-scale clients across banking, government, and telecom sectors in the UAE.

job.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
job.description: TAQA is seeking a Cybersecurity Analyst to protect critical energy infrastructure from cyber threats. You will monitor security events, respond to incidents, and improve the organization's overall security posture.

job.title: Full Stack Developer (React / Node.js)
job.description: Careem is hiring a Full Stack Developer to join the product engineering team. You will build scalable features for our super-app platform used by millions of users across the MENA region.

job.title: Data Engineer – Analytics Platform
job.description: stc is seeking a Data Engineer to build and maintain scalable data pipelines for our analytics platform. You will work with large datasets from telecom networks, CRM systems, and billing engines to power business intelligence dashboards.

job.title: Registered Nurse – ICU
job.description: Hamad Medical Corporation is recruiting experienced ICU Registered Nurses to join our critical care teams in Doha. Competitive tax-free salary, furnished accommodation, and annual flights are provided.

job.title: Pharmacist – Clinical
job.description: King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre is seeking a Clinical Pharmacist to join the pharmacy team and provide clinical pharmaceutical care to inpatient and outpatient populations.

job.title: Radiologist
job.description: Aster DM Healthcare is hiring a Consultant Radiologist for our flagship hospital in Dubai. You will provide specialist diagnostic radiology services covering CT, MRI, ultrasound, fluoroscopy, and interventional procedures.

job.title: Hotel General Manager
job.description: Rotana Hotels & Resorts is seeking an accomplished Hotel General Manager to lead a landmark 5-star property in Abu Dhabi. The successful candidate will drive revenue performance, guest satisfaction, and team development across all departments.

job.title: Executive Chef
job.description: Jumeirah Group is looking for an innovative Executive Chef to lead culinary operations across multiple F&B outlets within one of our iconic Dubai properties. You will craft exceptional dining experiences and lead a talented kitchen brigade.

job.title: Front Office Manager
job.description: Marriott International is hiring a Front Office Manager for a flagship property in Doha. You will lead the front desk, concierge, bell desk, and reservations teams to deliver an outstanding arrival and departure experience.

job.title: Sales Manager – B2B Corporate
job.description: GEMS Education is recruiting a B2B Sales Manager to develop and manage corporate school enrolment partnerships across UAE businesses, multinational companies, and government entities in Dubai.

job.title: Digital Marketing Manager
job.description: Chalhoub Group, the Middle East's leading luxury retail partner, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager to lead performance marketing, social media strategy, and e-commerce growth for our luxury fashion and beauty brands.

job.title: Procurement Manager – Construction
job.description: Arabtec Construction is seeking an experienced Procurement Manager to lead the sourcing, tendering, and purchasing activities for major building and infrastructure projects in Abu Dhabi.

job.title: Structural Design Engineer
job.description: Arup Middle East invites applications from talented Structural Design Engineers to join the structures team in Dubai. You will work on a diverse portfolio of iconic buildings, bridges, and infrastructure projects across the GCC.

job.title: Planning Engineer
job.description: Galfar Engineering & Contracting is seeking a Planning Engineer to manage project scheduling and progress monitoring for road infrastructure and civil construction projects in Oman.

job.title: MEP Coordinator
job.description: Drake & Scull International is hiring a MEP Coordinator to manage the coordination of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems for large mixed-use development projects in Dubai.

job.title: Piping Design Engineer
job.description: Technip Energies is looking for a Piping Design Engineer to join our Doha engineering centre supporting LNG and offshore oil & gas projects. You will produce detailed piping layouts, isometrics, and stress analysis reports.

job.title: Safety Officer – Oil & Gas
job.description: QatarEnergy is seeking a Safety Officer to support HSSE activities across onshore and offshore oil & gas facilities. The role involves implementing safety programs, conducting audits, and ensuring compliance with QatarEnergy HSE standards.

job.title: SCADA / Control Systems Engineer
job.description: ABB Ltd. Middle East is recruiting a SCADA / Control Systems Engineer to design, integrate, and commission automation and control systems for utilities and oil & gas clients across Abu Dhabi.

job.title: Network & Infrastructure Engineer
job.description: du Telecom is hiring a Network & Infrastructure Engineer to manage and optimise core network infrastructure supporting enterprise and carrier-grade telecommunications services across the UAE.

job.title: SAP S/4HANA Functional Consultant – FICO
job.description: Deloitte Middle East is seeking a Senior SAP S/4HANA FICO Consultant to join our technology advisory practice in Riyadh, supporting large enterprise transformation programs for major Saudi organisations.

job.title: DevOps Engineer
job.description: Etisalat (e&) is hiring a DevOps Engineer to accelerate software delivery for digital services and internal platforms. You will build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, and drive automation across development and operations.

job.title: Physiotherapist
job.description: NMC Healthcare, one of the largest private healthcare providers in the UAE, is recruiting a qualified Physiotherapist to join our multidisciplinary clinical team in Abu Dhabi.

job.title: Cardiologist – Consultant
job.description: Saudi German Hospital Group is recruiting a Consultant Cardiologist to lead cardiac care services at our Riyadh flagship hospital. Competitive package including accommodation, annual flights, and family benefits.

job.title: Dental Surgeon
job.description: Dr. Sulaiman Al Habib Medical Group is looking for experienced Dental Surgeons to join our modern outpatient dental clinics in Riyadh. We offer a state-of-the-art working environment and a highly competitive package.

job.title: Revenue Manager
job.description: IHG is hiring a Revenue Manager for our InterContinental property in Dubai. You will optimise room revenue by managing pricing strategies, OTA relationships, and distribution channel performance.

job.title: F&B Supervisor
job.description: Four Seasons Hotel Riyadh at Kingdom Centre is seeking a passionate F&B Supervisor to oversee dining operations across our signature restaurant outlets. You will lead service excellence and ensure unforgettable guest experiences.

job.title: Housekeeping Manager
job.description: Fairmont Hotels & Resorts (Accor) is looking for a Housekeeping Manager for our flagship Doha property. You will lead the housekeeping team to deliver an immaculate guest environment across all rooms, public areas, and heart of house.

job.title: Sales Executive – Real Estate
job.description: Emaar Properties, Dubai's largest real estate developer, is hiring Sales Executives to drive residential unit sales across iconic developments including Downtown Dubai, Dubai Hills, and The Valley.

job.title: Key Account Manager – FMCG
job.description: Almarai, the world's largest vertically integrated dairy company, is recruiting a Key Account Manager to manage major modern trade accounts (Panda, Carrefour, Lulu, BinDawood) across Riyadh.

job.title: Environment, Health & Safety (EHS) Specialist
job.description: SABIC is seeking an EHS Specialist to support environment, health, and safety compliance programs at its Jubail petrochemical complex. You will work closely with operations, engineering, and HSE management to maintain world-class safety standards.

job.title: Financial Controller
job.description: Majid Al Futtaim (MAF), the leading shopping mall, hospitality, and entertainment conglomerate in the Middle East, is hiring a Financial Controller to oversee the financial reporting and control function for a business unit in Dubai.

job.title: Instrument & Control Engineer
job.description: Petrofac is seeking an Instrument & Control Engineer to join our Abu Dhabi engineering team, supporting offshore platform and onshore oil & gas processing facility projects.

job.title: Machine Learning Engineer
job.description: G42, Abu Dhabi's leading AI and cloud computing company, is hiring a Machine Learning Engineer to develop and deploy production AI models across healthcare, smart city, and energy sector applications.
